title: Left 2 Parish
description: Infection spreads, passes from person to person. Left 2 Parish is a modpack for those looking for a zombie apocalypse experience with various types of infected that hunt day and night.
body:
The dead walk again a dangerous infection spreading between them and being passed onto those that fail to evade them who end up like them. Surviving from the hordes is a daunting task that however zombies aren't the only risk to your safty you are still human after all for now

This modpack adds various mods that enhance the survival experience in a post apocalyptic world. Balance food, water, temperature, and proper first aid all while navigating between abandoned buildings collecting weapons and materials. With all of the classic zombie apocalypse essentials like guns, cars, and scrappy weapons. However most importantly various types of zombies with general and special infected and not even the daylight is safe.
